• Culver City: SMPL Artisan Cheesecakes will be popping-up with yummy, fresh cheesecakes
• Long Beach: Slowlines Art will be popping-up 
• Costa Mesa: Made by Mabel Ceramics will be popping-up

events.title: Free Tasting: Crown & Hops
events.description: Based out of Inglewood, CA, Crown and Hops is the first black-owned, woman-owned, and veteran-owned brewery. Owners Beny Ashburn and Teo Hunter have disrupted the space and built a brand whose core mission is to create culture equity in the beer industry. Come by, show your support and try some of their wonderful beers!

events.title: Free Tasting: Simple Shots
events.description: Come sample the spirit based juice shot. Simple ingredients, all natural, made with real fruit.

events.title: Store Closed – MERRY CHRISTMAS!
events.description: We'll be closed for Christmas Day but open again on December 26th at our normal hours.  Enjoy your holiday!

events.title: Free Tasting: Nankai Shochu
events.description: Come taste and learn about the wonderful world of shochu with these tasty spirits!

events.title: Food Pop Up: Shuck Brother's Oysters
events.description: Join us for some oysters and good times! Shuck brothers will be serving freshly shucked oysters, Maine lobster rolls and Maine lobster rolls!  YUUMMMM

events.title: Free Tasting: Mario's Hard Espresso
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Mario's Hard Espresso!

events.title: Free Tasting: Ghia N/A Spritz
events.description: Join us for a complimentary tasting of GHIA n/a spritz!

events.title: Free Tasting: Ford's Gin & Negronis
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Ford's Gin, "The Cocktail Gin."  Complimentary samples of Ford's Gin negronis will also be on offer!

events.title: Free Tasting: Livewire Canned Cocktails
events.description: LiveWire creates award-winning cocktails made by award-winning bartenders. The company's mission is to help further highlight the immensely talented bartenders that create brilliant drinks & nights, around the world. LiveWire bartender-collaborators design unique cocktails, using the finest spirits in the world, natural flavors and extracts, and choose the artists that design the art on the packaging to help their vision come alive. Come check out this bold new brand with a free tasting of their exciting ready-to-drink canned cocktails!

events.title: Free Tasting: Nosotros Tequila  & Mezcal
events.description: Nosotros is a small-batch agave spirits brand that marries the Pura Vida lifestyle of Costa Rica with the rebel spirit of Mexico, blending them under the California sun. Come on in and try this independent brand's award-winning Blanco, Reposado, and Mezcal!

events.title: Free Tasting: Mas Vino x Wonderwerk Wines
events.description: Get in the mood for love with a free tasting of fun wines from Wonderwerk & Mas Vino: Chismosa & Como La Flor!

events.title: Fiore Flower Pop-Up
events.description: We’ve got everything you need to make this Valentine’s extra special, including beautiful bouquets by Fiore!

events.title: Free Tasting: Lost Republic Bourbon & Rye
events.description:
Lost Republic Distilling Co. was created by two best friends who had a vision of creating and delivering California's highest quality craft whiskey. Their Master Distiller has a keen attention to detail during the blending process, giving their whiskey flavor complexity and depth.   
Come try their small batch American whiskey produced right here in the heart of Sonoma.

events.title: Free Tasting: Bottle Logic Brewing
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Bottle Logic Brewery!

events.title: Free Tasting: Sake High
events.description: Sake High! is premium junmai sake brewed in Kyoto, Japan using classic techniques and local ingredients. Come by and try the refreshing sake, which comes in single cans and bottles.

events.title: Free Tasting: Kings County Whiskey
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with the legendary NY whiskey, Kings County!

events.title: Free Tasting: Via Carota Cocktails

events.title: Free Tasting: Wolf Spirits
events.description: Jef from Wolf Spirits will be sampling Granalta Mezcal and Rum along with Mama Chuy.

events.title: Free Tasting: Perro Verde Mezcal
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Perro Verde Mezcal!

events.title: Free Tasting: Penelope Whiskey and Yellowstone Whiskey
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Penelope and Yellowstone whiskeys.

events.title: Free Tasting: Kolfok Wines
events.description: We'll be sampling through 3 wines by Kolfolk. Winemaker, Stefan Wellanschitz is a natura wine maker in Austria in the Ödenburger Valley. He wants to avoid monoculture and prefers the grapes grow naturally together and whatever else might sprout up in between such as flowers and herbs. These wine are super fun and delicious!

events.title: Free Tasting: AgaveLuz Tequila
events.description: Join us for a free tasting of AgaveLuz, and celebrate women's history month with female owned organic tequila.

events.title: Free Tasting: Ysidro Sake Spritz
events.description: Come enjoy a free taste of this sophisticated spritz made with super premium sake and real, organic grapefruit & sea salt.

events.title: Free Tasting: Two Stacks Irish Whiskey
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Two Stacks Irish Whiskey. We'll be sampling out their Dram in Can RTD's!

events.title: Free Tasting: Bordiga Vermouth and Spirits

events.title: Free Tasting: Slowdays Gin
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Slowdays gin!

events.title: Free Tasting: Serendipity Wines
events.description: Join us for a free tasting of some European natural wines! We'll be tasting a wine from Italy, France, and Austria!

events.title: Free Tasting: Sipwell Canned Wine
events.description: Sipwell Wine Company is premium California wine with a can-do spirit. A female-founded and Black-owned company, they make award-winning canned wine that’s a little bit of a renegade. Sipwell sparkling wines are naturally can-conditioned, are fermented dry, meaning they have 0g sugar, and are sourced from organic or sustainably farmed grapes in California's Central Coast. These single-serve aluminum cans are infinitely recyclable, portable, and perfect for celebrating life's little moments.

events.title: Free Tasting: Mama Chuy Gin
events.description: Come sample this refreshing Mexican gin.  Distilled in small batches at the Satvrnal Distillery under Master Distiller Pedro Andres from a pristine base spirit produced by clean, swift fermentation and precise distillation. Vibrant lime zest greets the nose, with soft herbal bay leaf and classic juniper weaving a harmonious botanical tapestry; a crescendo of citrus brightens the palate before a light, coriander-driven spice on the finish.

events.title: Free Tasting: Granalta Blanco Tequila, Mezcal & Rum
events.description: Come sample these incredible tequilas & mezcal from Granalta.  Made in San Dioniso Ocotepec, Oaxaca by Miguel Martinez, these artisanal expressions are roasted with mesquite & oak, milled by Tahona, fermented in cypress wood & twice distilled in a copper pot still.

events.title: Free Tasting: Harland Brewing
events.description: Carl from Harland Brewing in San Diego, California will be tasting beers to customers in store!

events.title: Free Tasting: BTL SVC
events.description: BTL SVC provides award-winning, hand-crafted, premium cocktails, conveniently served anytime and anywhere.

events.title: Free Tasting: Tequio Tequila
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Tequio Tequila!

events.title: Free Tasting: Amante 1530
events.description: Hailing from the historic Il Palagio 1530 estate in Tuscany, this latest innovation in amaro offers a new take on an old classic; combining aromas of Italian citrus, ginger and honeysuckle to help you enjoy a unique bittersweet taste and a thoroughly delicious afternoon.

events.title: Free Tasting: Duvel Beer
events.description: Join us for a free tasting with Duvel, the iconic Belgian Golden Ale.

events.title: Free Tasting: Domaine Zafeirakis Wines
events.description: Join us for a free tasting of these incredible organic wines from 4th generation Greek wine maker Christos Zafeirakis.

events.title: Free Tasting: Abre Ojos Tequila

events.title: Free Tasting: Suncliffe Gin
events.description: Come join us for a free tasting of this aromatic gin made with juniper berries from the twisted trees of Sedona, AZ.

events.title: Free Tasting: Morro Mezcal
events.description: Morro Mezcal crafts their small batch artisanal spirits using time-honored methods and traditions of mezcal production, using mature single origin agaves, an earthen hardwood-fueled oven, open air wooden fermentation vessels and small wood-fired copper still distillation. Their mezcals are distilled to proof using agaves grown in the mountains of El Gramal in Oaxaca giving depth, character and complexity.

events.title: Food Pop-Up: Branch Patty
events.description: Branch Patty makes handcrafted Jamaican Patties and Coco Bread. They started in Brooklyn and now they're made in LA! They pair perfectly with wine and beer!

events.title: Free Tasting: Raicilla De Una
events.description: Raicilla is an agave spirit steeped in folklore and tradition. With over 400 years of history, it’s considered the grandfather of tequila, the great-grandfather of mezcal, and the purest expression of Mexico’s agave spirits.

events.description: Come enjoy a free tasting of this recently re-established classic bourbon.  California distilled – using locally sourced California-grown purple barley, rye, and corn – this bourbon is aged 3 years for a high-quality, smooth drink.

events.title: Free Tasting: Kin A Peel Liqueur
events.description: Come try this deliciously whimsical entry into the liqueur world.  KIN A-Peel Banana Liqueur is an irresistible fusion of our white whiskey with lusciously over-ripe bananas. Crafted to perfection, this banana liqueur promises an A-Peeling experience for both your cocktail creations and culinary adventures.
